text:
Edition 
DESCRIPTION: The edition of the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC) Cancer Staging manual used to 
describe the patient’s cancer stage. 
SHORT NAME: AJCC_EDITION 
LONG NAME: AJCC_EDITION 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
Clinical and staging 
SOURCE: 
Oncology Care Model Data Registry 
VALUES: 
7th 
8th 
Null/missing = OCM participant did not report the staging data or it was invalid (reference details in 
the RPTD_TO_RGSTRY codebook entry) 
COMMENT: 
For any initial diagnosis
